mapper.select: SELECT id, name, pay_month_count, additional_info FROM payment_type WHERE is_deleted=0 AND id IN(SELECT payment_type_id FROM room_payment_type WHERE is_deleted=0 AND room_id=#{id})
select id, name, pay_month_count, additional_info from payment_type where id = #{id}
select id, name, pay_month_count, additional_info from payment_type where id in (select payment_type_id from room_payment_type where room_id = #{roomId})
